positive: Stylized minimalist silhouette illustration of a whimsical mountain landscape at sunset. The scene features rolling peaks, abstract clouds, and a crescent moon, rendered with thick, clean lines and vibrant watercolor washes. Strong contrast between deep indigo blues and glowing gold-orange gradients. The composition is perfectly centered, designed to look fantastic as an apparel print. Flat graphic aesthetic, vector art quality, highly detailed, smooth edges.
negative: blur, noise, artifacts, low quality, text, watermark, logo, copyright, dirty, messy, gradients too soft, complex detail, extra limbs, bad anatomy, photorealism
